mapper.update: update his_billing_refund_order set process_status = #{processStatus}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, refund_mirror_row_id as refundMirrorRowId, origin_charge_detail_id as originChargeDetailId, origin_mirror_row_id as originMirrorRowId, refund_qty as refundQty, value_level as valueLevel, process_status as processStatus from his_billing_refund_order where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and refund_mirror_row_id = #{refundMirrorRowId} and process_status = 'DONE' and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 order by create_time desc limit 1
